<style id='block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css'>
/* Large screens (desktops, 992px and up) */
@media ( min-width: 992px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-large-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Medium screens (tablets, between 768px and 992px) */
@media ( min-width: 768px ) and ( max-width: 991.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-medium-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Small screens (mobile devices, less than 768px) */
@media ( max-width: 767.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-small-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}
/*# sourceURL=block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css */
</style>

/* ^^^^^^^^^^ */

html{
	scroll-behavior:smooth;
}
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
	scroll-margin-top: 2em;
}

.site-title, .site-description {
    display: none;
}

.hidden-mobile {
	@media(max-width:500px){
		display:none;
	}
}

.wp-block-search {
	width: 300px;
}
.sticky-item {
	position: sticky !important;
	top: 60px;
}

.wp-block-column {
	position: relative;
}

.custom-overlay-404 {
	position: absolute;
	bottom: -2em;
	left: -2em;
}

.header-image {
	max-width: 300px;
	width: 25%;
}

.subscription-next-payment {
	display: none;
}

.margin-bottom-0 {
	margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.advisors {
	justify-content: center;
}

.advisors .wp-block-image {
	min-width: 100px;
}

.nowrap {
	white-space: nowrap;
}

input.phone-input {
	padding-left: 70px !important;
}

.StripeElement:not(.wcpay-payment-element) {
	border-radius: 24px !important;
	overflow: hidden;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 480px) {
	.nerd-out .wp-block-columns {
			flex-wrap: wrap !important;
	}
	.nerd-out .wp-block-column {
			flex-basis: 100% !important;
	}
	.nerd-out p {
		text-align: center !important;
	}
}

.wp-block-cover.is-style-contain img {
    object-fit: contain;
}


/* Stripe */
div#wc-stripe-payment-request-wrapper, #wc-stripe-payment-request-button-separator {
	display: none !important;
}

/* Klaviyo */
.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form {
    padding: 0 !important;
    background-color: transparent !important;
}

/* Override the global "row" direction ONLY for Generation YUMI form */



/* apply horizontal layout ONLY to the Wacmyk form */
.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form > .needsclick {
  flex-direction: row !important;
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
}

.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form > .needsclick::placeholder {
	letter-spacing: 0 !important;
}

.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form div[data-testid="form-row"] div[data-testid="form-component"] {
	padding: 0 !important;
	background-color: transparent !important;
}

.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk input[type="email"] { border-radius: 50px 0 0 50px !important;
background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--primary-off-white) !important }

.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form button {
	border-radius: 0 50px 50px 0 !important;
	padding: 6px 20px !important;
}

.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk div:has([type="email"]){
	min-width: 200px;
}

h2.with-mark {
	margin-bottom: 15px;
}

h2.with-mark em mark {
	transform: translate(0px, -15px) rotate(-15deg);
	letter-spacing: 0px;
}


@media only screen and (min-width: 480px) {
	.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk .klaviyo-form button {
		border-radius: 0 50px 50px 0 !important;
		padding: 6px 40px !important;
	}
	
	.klaviyo-form-Wacmyk div:has([type="email"]){
		min-width: 300px;
	}

	h2.with-mark {
		margin-bottom: 35px;
	}
	h2.with-mark em mark {
		transform: translate(-30px, 10px) rotate(-15deg);
	}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 1000px) {
	h2.with-mark {
		margin-bottom: 0;
	}
}


/* Nick P - temp adjustments..
.custom-modal .options-list .wizard-option {
    min-height: unset!important;
}

.custom-modal .options-list .summary-item {
	min-height: unset!important;
}
*/

/* Kim Adjustments - adding a radius to Media & Text Blocks */

.wp-block-media-text .wp-block-media-text__media {
	border-radius: 24px;
}

.overflow-brand-container{
	width:100vw;
	overflow:scroll;
}
.overflow-img-brand{
	width:1000px;
}

.overflow-img-2{
  width:200% !important;
height: 610px !important;
}
.overflow-image-img {
	 width:100% !important;
	border-radius:20px;
height: 610px !important;

	display:flex;
	flex-direction:column;
	justify-content:center;
	align-items:center;
  overflow: scroll;

}

/* Kim Adjustments - changing the line height of the text in the recipe blog posts */

.recipe-text {
margin-top: -18px;
}

/* Nick P. - Add missing letter spacing style for header elements. Need to add a permanent fix in theme.json, similar to https://github.com/wpcomvip/www-helloyumi-com/pull/409 - however consider using a custom "var(--wp--custom--..." setting for best practice.
 */
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
	letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

/* CSS for Product Reviews */

div#reviews {
	padding-top: 30px;
	
}

div#reviews .star-rating--average {
	font-size: 1.5rem;
}


.woocommerce #reviews ol.commentlist li {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--secondary-sea-green) !important;
    padding: 0 0 5px !important;
    margin: 0 0 25px !important;
}

.woocommerce #reviews ol.commentlist li:last-of-type {
    border-bottom: none !important;
	
}

.woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination {
    background: none;
}

.woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul.page-numbers {
    border: none;
}

.woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul.page-numbers li{
    border: none;
}
.woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul.page-numbers li a {
    padding: 0.5em 1em;
}
.woocommerce .woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li a:focus,
.woocommerce .woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li a:hover,
.woocommerce .woocommerce-Reviews nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li span.current {
    background: none;
    text-decoration: underline;
}

/* -Vincent fix the Learn More button width #9465656 */
.woocommerce div.product form.cart .group_table td:first-child {
width: inherit !important;
}

@media (max-width: 781px) {
    header .wp-block-button a[href^="/shop"] {
        line-height: 1;
    }

    header .site-brand {
        margin-top: 4px;
    }
}

.yumi-report-card {
  background: #F4FCE3; /* your brand's cream-lime background */
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px;
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.yumi-product-name {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #004225; /* your deep green heading color */
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.yumi-best-by, .yumi-lot-number {
  font-size: 1em;
  margin: 4px 0;
}

.yumi-heavy-metals-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 15px;
}

.yumi-metal-name {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
}

.yumi-metal-value {
  font-weight: 400;
}
:root :where(.wp-block-button .wp-block-button__link){background-color: var(--wp--custom--button--color--background);border-radius: var(--wp--custom--button--border--radius);border-color: var(--wp--custom--button--border--color);color: var(--wp--custom--button--color--text);font-size: var(--wp--custom--button--typography--font-size);font-weight: var(--wp--custom--button--typography--font-weight);line-height: var(--wp--custom--button--typography--line-height);}
:root :where(.wp-block-navigation){font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--normal);}
:root :where(.wp-block-site-tagline){font-size: var(--wp--preset--font-size--small);line-height: 1.3;}
:root :where(.wp-block-image img, .wp-block-image .wp-block-image__crop-area, .wp-block-image .components-placeholder){border-radius: 24px;}
:root{--wp--preset--duotone--grayscale:url(#wp-duotone-grayscale);}
/*# sourceURL=global-styles-inline-css */
</style>

<style id='wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css'>

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
/*# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css */

    <style>
        .yumi-report-card {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            max-width: 600px;
        }
        .yumi-product-name {
            margin-top: 0;
            color: #333;
        }
        .yumi-heavy-metals-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
            gap: 15px;
            margin: 20px 0;
        }
        .yumi-metal {
            background: #fff;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 5px;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .yumi-metal-name {
            display: block;
            font-weight: bold;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #555;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
        .yumi-metal-value {
            display: block;
            font-size: 18px;
            color: #333;
        }

        }

            color: #c62828;

			}

			@keyframes wp-interactivity-router-loading-bar-start-animation {

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
//# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after
</script>
